scripts.test:smoke: npm run test:registry && npm run test:contracts
scripts.test: npm run test:utils && npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:full: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.typecheck: cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../frontend && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.lint:fix: cd backend && npm run lint:fix && cd ../frontend && npm run lint:fix
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.precommit: npm run test:smoke && npm run typecheck
